A '''phi-inverted lateral stabilizer''' was a model of [[Stabilizer/Legends|stabilizer]]. They were used on [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] to stabilize the power flow to the [[Starfighter/Legends|craft's]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]].<ref name="SWS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
